ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the trading day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the trading day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "traded_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of shares traded */,
  "delivery_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares delivered */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Sector ID */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Industry ID */,
  "trading_volume_value" REAL /* Trading volume in terms of value */,
  "fifty_two_week_high" REAL /* 52-week high price */,
  "fifty_two_week_low" REAL /* 52-week low price */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "price_to_earnings_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol", "date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol related to the news article */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "article_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "article_url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol related to the rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_ratings_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol related to the dividend */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_dividends_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID related to the portfolio */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol in the portfolio */,
  "number_of_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID related to the transaction */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol involved in the transaction */,
  "number_of_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (buy or sell) */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_transactions_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol")
)
column_names: Highest price of the stock during the trading day
Lowest price of the stock during the trading day
Trading volume in terms of value
Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin)
Unique identifier for each news article
Stock symbol related to the news article
Stock symbol related to the rating
Rating given by the analyst (e.g., buy, sell, hold)
Stock symbol related to the dividend
User ID related to the portfolio
Number of shares in the portfolio
User ID related to the transaction
Stock symbol involved in the transaction
Number of shares involved in the transaction
